title: Growing up
summary: Way back in 2002, or perhaps 2003, I'd acquired a copy of Macromedia Dreamweaver and started playing about with HTML. The timeline is a bit blurry, considering that it's almost twenty years ago. CSS wasn't really a thing yet, though, and IE6 was still the main browser of choice.
content: Way back in 2002, or perhaps 2003, I'd acquired a copy of Macromedia Dreamweaver and started playing about with HTML. The timeline is a bit blurry, considering that it's almost twenty years ago. CSS wasn't really a thing yet, though, and IE6 was still the main browser of choice.
